reason: Backend implementation must preserve handler -> service -> repository layering and avoid PO/GORM leakage.
New public daily recommendations endpoint must follow route naming, envelope, list response, and error contracts.
New Go files, types, and tests must follow project naming, line width, and gofmt requirements.
Frontend API client and GalleryPage integration must follow /api/v1 envelope, type import, displayable-image filtering, and build contracts.
Feature spans cmd, handler, service, repository, model, and frontend; use project layout guidance to place files correctly.
